message:
feat(abi): native pthread cancellation, strptime, wchar extensions, and memstream stdio

Replace GlibcCallThrough stubs with native implementations for:
- pthread_cancel/setcancelstate/setcanceltype/testcancel (cooperative model)
- strptime (format parser with %Y/%m/%d/%H/%M/%S/%p and weekday/month names)
- wchar_abi: wcpcpy, wcpncpy, wcscasecmp, wcsncasecmp, wmemrchr (GNU exts)
- stdio_abi: fmemopen/open_memstream/fmemclose memory-backed streams,
  remove redundant runtime_policy gates from fopen/fclose hot paths
- string_abi: SafetyLevel-aware hardened mode formatting, dlvsym formatting
- math_abi: fix lgammaf negative-integer errno (EDOM -> ERANGE per C99),
  add acoshf/atanhf/tanhf/asinhf domain/range errno tests
- runtime_policy: mode-switch detection logging, structured JSONL mode events,
  kernel export helpers, reverse-round diversity snapshot surface
- Minor formatting cleanup across dlfcn, malloc, stdlib, termios ABI modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
